prevented_failure_purpose: Prevent a story artifact or completion claim from advancing when the current StorylineDesign-owned process, Guard applicability, structured story-state surfaces, model-to-prose bindings, or final-artifact evidence is missing, stale, substituted, or unresolved.

external_evidence_universe.description: Current FlowGuard process route and TraceGuard, WorldGuard, LogicGuard, and SourceGuard applicability evidence
external_evidence_universe.authority_source: StorylineDesign closure bundle and child-Guard evidence surfaces

external_evidence_universe.description: Current novel ledger, story contribution, chapter interface, promise, continuity, voice, and reverse-outline evidence
external_evidence_universe.authority_source: StorylineDesign structured longform surfaces and native validators

external_evidence_universe.description: Current bidirectional model-to-prose binding, reader-state, resistance, register, duplication, drift, and length-review evidence
external_evidence_universe.authority_source: StorylineDesign model-prose binding surface and validator

external_evidence_universe.description: Current final artifact identity, source requirements, and artifact-bound semantic review
external_evidence_universe.authority_source: StorylineDesign longform closure surface and native validator

prevented_failure_classes.title: FlowGuard process evidence is missing
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: a substantive story closure omits the required FlowGuard process-route surface
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers the declared current closure fixture and validator, not every possible process-evidence defect.

prevented_failure_classes.title: TraceGuard storyline evidence is missing
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: a substantive story closure omits required chronology, causality, or revelation applicability evidence
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers the declared current closure fixture and validator, not all possible trace defects.

prevented_failure_classes.title: WorldGuard is scoped out merely because the story is fictional
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: fiction is used as the sole reason to omit material world-claim validation
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Proves rejection of the declared fiction-only scope-out, not that every world claim is true.

prevented_failure_classes.title: LogicGuard theme support is missing
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: a substantive closure omits theme-support applicability or evidence
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers the declared missing surface, not the truth of a theme interpretation.

prevented_failure_classes.title: SourceGuard canon support is missing
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: a substantive closure omits canon/source applicability or evidence
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers the declared missing surface, not the completeness of every external source.

prevented_failure_classes.title: AI prose is substituted for required evidence
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: AI self-report or prose-only review is used in place of a required structured surface
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers the declared prose-only evidence pattern, not every possible misleading narrative.

prevented_failure_classes.title: FlowGuard process evidence is stale
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: process-route evidence predates the current story model
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers the declared stale-evidence signal and refresh action.

prevented_failure_classes.title: A reverse outline is substituted for the novel ledger
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: one shallow artifact is presented as multiple required structured longform surfaces
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers the declared substitution fixture and current aggregate validator.

prevented_failure_classes.title: A weak reverse outline is submitted as closure
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: reverse-outline rows without the closure contract are treated as aggregate closure evidence
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers the declared wrong-artifact fixture, not every weak reverse outline.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Markdown is substituted for structured model surfaces
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: a broad report is used where locally openable JSON model evidence is required
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers the declared non-JSON substitution pattern.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Final-prose review is not artifact-bound
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: semantic review evidence does not identify the reviewed final artifact hash
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Proves hash binding for the declared fixture, not semantic review quality.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Final artifact and review hashes differ
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the semantic review is bound to a different artifact identity
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Proves identity mismatch detection, not review correctness.

prevented_failure_classes.title: The final artifact surface is missing
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: final-prose closure omits the final artifact identity
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers the declared missing final-artifact surface.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Final-prose source requirements are missing
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: final-prose closure omits the source-requirements surface
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers presence of the declared source-requirements surface, not source truth.

prevented_failure_classes.title: A chapter interface uses generic handoffs
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: adjacent chapter inputs or outputs are placeholder text rather than concrete state
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers the declared placeholder-handoff fixture.

prevented_failure_classes.title: A key or major promise remains unresolved
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: book or series closure leaves a key or major promise in a blocking state
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers promise status and disposition, not reader satisfaction.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Material continuity rows are missing
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: a longform ledger omits required continuity evidence
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers the declared continuity absence, not every continuity contradiction.

prevented_failure_classes.title: A material prose span is unbound
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: important prose has no model references or remains listed as an unresolved binding gap
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers the declared unresolved span, not every possible prose-to-model mapping.

prevented_failure_classes.title: A key model reference is unrealized in prose
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: a key or major model row has no prose realization
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers the declared unresolved model reference.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Duplicate binding adds no changed effect
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: multiple prose spans bind the same model rows without a recorded changed reader effect
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers structural duplicate binding, not artistic repetition quality.

prevented_failure_classes.title: A major reveal has no resistance or cost
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: a material reveal advances without required resistance, cost, delay, or scoped reason
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers the declared missing resistance field, not all pacing judgments.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Reader hypothesis collapses prematurely
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: an unresolved reader-state drift finding remains while binding is marked passed
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers the declared unresolved drift fixture, not a universal reader-response prediction.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Term register ownership drifts
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: material prose lacks required register-owner evidence or retains unresolved register drift
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers the declared register-evidence fixture, not every voice judgment.

prevented_failure_classes.title: A length outlier lacks binding review
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: a blocking length outlier has no binding-density review
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers missing review for the declared outlier, not a fixed chapter-length rule.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Final prose lacks model-prose binding
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: final-prose closure omits the model-prose binding surface
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: Covers presence and current native validity of the declared surface, not literary quality.

claim_boundary: A pass licenses only the 25 explicitly declared current failure classes against the current fixtures, validators, model, and source fingerprints. It does not prove literary quality, reader delight, factual truth, installation, release, or completeness against undeclared future failures.
